week: Jul 1–5 · A B C A B · fly home Jul 6
principles: Goal: hold strength + stay springy. Not the week to chase PRs
Every lift at RPE 7 — two clean reps always left in the tank
Kit: dumbbells, bench, cables, pull-up bar, treadmill
40–45 min. Short on time? First 3 lifts + treadmill finisher
Morning check-in decides the day: green = as planned, amber = trim a set, red = walk + mobility only
Sleep and hydration on the road beat any set you'll do

days.warmup: RAMP 6–8 min: treadmill walk 3 min → leg swings, hip openers, arm circles → 10 bodyweight squats, 5 slow push-ups → 3 crisp squat jumps to prime

exercises.name: DB goblet squat
cues: Hold one DB at your chest
Brace, sit down between the hips

exercises.name: DB Romanian deadlift
cues: Soft knees, hinge at the hips
Flat back, squeeze glutes at the top

exercises.name: DB bench press
cues: Drive your feet into the floor

exercises.name: Pull-ups
exercises.notes: Band or slow negatives if needed; add weight once 3×6 is easy.

exercises.name: 1-arm DB row
cues: Row the DB to your hip

exercises.name: DB reverse lunge
cues: Step back, drop the back knee

days.power: Primer before squats: 3×3 crisp squat jumps — max intent, full recovery
days.mobility: Hips + shoulders 6 min while you cool down

days.warmup: RAMP 6–8 min: treadmill 3 min → leg swings, ankle rocks, deep squat holds → 2×5 pogo hops (quiet landings)

exercises.name: DB Bulgarian split squat
exercises.notes: Closest thing to a lunge pattern all week — own it.

exercises.name: DB Romanian deadlift
cues: DBs stay close to the legs

exercises.name: Dead bug
cues: Low back flat on the floor

days.conditioning: Treadmill: 8 × (20s hard / 90s easy) — this IS the fencing energy system. All-out on the 20s.

days.focus: Push/pull balance + épée arm care · ~40 min
days.warmup: Band-less shoulder prep: arm circles, wall slides, scap push-ups 2×8, light-DB external rotations

exercises.name: Cable face pull
exercises.notes: Shoulder health + posture — the unglamorous rep that keeps you fencing.

exercises.name: DB wrist/forearm prehab
cues: The épée wrist pays rent here

days.conditioning: Optional: treadmill easy 10 min or 6×20s strides

note: Travel block, built around the hotel gym. Weights start at smart estimates — spin the wheels to match the rack. Real periodized base block starts when you're home; full-time plan activates Aug 15 after the force-velocity test.
